source_jobs.title: Customer Service and Product Support Specialist
source_jobs.description:
Alpinestars is a world leader in protective gear, apparel, and technical equipment for motorsports and action sports. Our mission is to provide top-tier performance and safety products for both elite athletes and everyday riders. Behind every product we deliver is a commitment to service, integrity, and excellence.
 
We are currently seeking a Customer Service & Product Support Specialist to join our eCommerce division. This position focuses on ensuring customer satisfaction through responsive communication, product support, and claims resolution related to Alpinestars' technical gear and apparel.

source_jobs.title: Dealer Developer
source_jobs.description:
Alpinestars is seeking enthusiastic, energetic, sports-minded people to fill a Dealer Development position in our Motorcycle division. 
 
This is not a fully remote role — it is a field-based role that combines remote work with roughly 75% travel to dealers across the territory. Candidates should live in, or be open to relocating to a central location within the "Mid-South" region (Tennessee/North Carolina/South Carolina/Georgia).

source_jobs.title: Digital Community Specialist
source_jobs.description: Alpinestars is a world leader in protective gear, apparel, and technical equipment for motorsports and action sports. Our mission is to provide top-tier performance and safety products for both elite athletes and everyday riders. Behind every product we deliver is a commitment to service, integrity, and excellence.

source_jobs.title: Helmet Service Technician
source_jobs.description:
About Alpinestars
Alpinestars is a world-leading manufacturer of professional motorsports products, including protective gear, technical apparel, and advanced electronic systems. With a legacy rooted in innovation, performance, and quality, Alpinestars is committed to protecting and supporting riders and athletes across the globe.
 
 
Position Summary
The Helmet Service Technician will provide technical evaluations, repairs, and support for Alpinestars helmet products while delivering exceptional customer service via email and other customer communication channels. This individual will serve as the primary point of contact for helmet-related service inquiries and will be responsible for supporting customers through the inspection, repair, warranty review, and resolution process.
The Helmet Service Technician will also act as a critical liaison between customers, Quality Assurance, Product Development, and Product Services teams by identifying trends, documenting field issues, and providing feedback to improve future products and customer experiences.

source_jobs.title: Inside Sales
source_jobs.description: Alpinestars’ is currently seeking an enthusiastic, energetic, sports-minded person to fill an Inside Sales position. The Inside Salesperson will work with Alpinestars dealers across the US and will work with the Dealer Development team in the field. The ideal candidate will be a motivated self-starter with the ability to connect with dealers via telephone. Additionally, the ideal candidate must be organized and resourceful with the motivation to achieve sales results.

source_jobs.title: Junior Graphic Designer
source_jobs.description:
About Alpinestars
Alpinestars is a world leader in high-performance motorsports apparel, protective gear, and lifestyle products. With deep roots in motocross, road racing, cycling, and action sports, we fuse cutting-edge innovation with iconic style. Our creative team drives the visual identity of the brand across all platforms, ensuring every design reflects our passion for performance, style, and authenticity.
 
Position Overview
We are seeking a talented Junior Graphic Designer with a strong passion for motorsports culture and design to join our art department. This role will support the development of high-quality visual content for marketing, product launches, and brand initiatives for motorcycling, apparel, and auto.
 
The ideal candidate will be a creative thinker with a keen eye for detail, a solid understanding of design principles, and the ability to work in a fast-paced, collaborative environment.

source_jobs.title: Returns Coordinator
source_jobs.description: Alpinestars is a world leader in protective gear, apparel, and technical equipment for motorsports and action sports, driven by a commitment to performance, safety, and innovation. Behind every product is a dedication to service, integrity, and excellence; extending beyond the point of sale to ensure a seamless customer experience.

source_jobs.title: Senior Graphic Designer
source_jobs.description:
As a Senior Graphic Designer, you will play a key role in developing visually compelling, innovative, and strategically driven design solutions across a wide range of mediums. You’ll lead the design process from concept through execution, ensuring high-quality, on-brand communications that resonate with our audience and elevate the brand.
Working closely with the Creative Director, you'll take ownership of campaigns and asset creation, delivering on time and with excellence.

source_jobs.title: Visual Merchandising Manager
source_jobs.description:
Alpinestars is looking for a Visual Merchandising Manager to bring the Alpinestars brand to life in-store. This role is responsible for executing compelling merchandising strategies, designing impactful product displays, and ensuring a consistent brand identity across all retail touchpoints. The ideal candidate will have a passion for motorsports and a deep understanding of how to communicate product features, benefits, and performance through visual storytelling.
 
This position requires creativity, attention to detail, and strong collaboration with sales and communications teams, retail partners, and the creative team to ensure an exceptional customer experience that aligns with the Alpinestars brand.

notes: Alpinestars is a world leader in protective gear, apparel, and technical equipment for motorsports and action sports.
